ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2021-22) */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played in the season */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Wins in the season */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Losses in the season */,
  "t" INTEGER /* Ties in the season */,
  "otl" INTEGER /* Overtime losses in the season */,
  "sol" INTEGER /* Shootout losses in the season */,
  "gf" INTEGER /* Goals for in the season */,
  "ga" INTEGER /* Goals against in the season */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Goal differential */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points earned in the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the stats pertain to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stats belong to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Penalties incurred by the player in the game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Shots on goal by the player in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Hits by the player in the game */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Blocked shots by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the coach */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the note pertains to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_notes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, broken bone) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the injury (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_highlights" (
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each highlight */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the highlight pertains to */,
  "highlight_type" TEXT /* Type of highlight (e.g., goal, save, hit) */,
  "highlight_clip" TEXT /* Link to the highlight clip or summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_highlights_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
